creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-01-12 01:12:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ftp/filezilla        Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update to 3.3.1
  
  Switch to using the now mandantroy unicode version of wx,
  and include new depend on xdg-utils.
  
  Special thanks for the bsd.wx.mk magic
  that made updating the unicode bit painless.
  
  PR:             ports/142550
  Submitted by:   "Joseph S. Atkinson" <jsa@wickedmachine.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.31      +4 -1      ports/ftp/filezilla/Makefile
  1.21      +3 -3      ports/ftp/filezilla/distinfo
  1.20      +4 -0      ports/ftp/filezilla/pkg-plist
